---
title: "02. 速战、粮秣与战争成本"
subtitle: "Speed, Logistics, and the Cost of War"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 2
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 作战 treats war as a bounded resource system whose fidelity degrades once time, transport, and expenditure exceed recoverable limits."
---

**Chapters:** 作战第二  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion information theory`, `ring arithmetic`, `dynamical systems`

{{< include articles/category_02_speed_logistics_cost_of_war.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
